workaround: To enable: add a GitHub Actions step that runs the GraphQL query and commits the result to this file, or expose a Discussions REST endpoint via the MCP server configuration.

activity_summary.velocity_note: Strong merge velocity continuing: ~70 PRs merged in the last 7 days (Jun 29 – Jul 5). Spike week was Jun 29–Jul 2 (74 PRs merged). Fix-heavy phase: 57% of merges are fix/* commits — stabilization ahead of expected release.
